dod.item: .meta/ description tree generated for all top-level directories
Gap analysis produced (missing tests, undocumented APIs, arch concerns)
PRD written with /specify and reviewed by stakeholder
Acceptance criteria defined for all features
Domain model validated by domain-modeler agent
Edge cases and error scenarios documented
Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) written for key decisions
System boundaries and component interfaces defined
All PRD items decomposed into tasks via TaskMaster
Each task has acceptance criteria and test strategy
Architect has reviewed technical detail on all tasks
Lessons learned captured for next iteration

transitions.reason: Greenfield bootstrap complete. .meta/description.md and gap-analysis.md created. PRD exists — proceeding to Spec for review and refinement.
Spec phase complete. PRD reviewed, domain model validated, edge cases documented. Proceeding to Design for architecture decisions and component interfaces.
Design phase complete. 3 ADRs written, system design with API contract defined, UX flow documented, risks identified. Proceeding to Decompose to create task graph.

Decompose complete. 11 tasks created with dependencies, acceptance criteria, and test strategies. Tasks ordered: scaffolding -> models -> readers -> API -> frontend -> P1 features -> integration tests. Proceeding to Build.

Build phase complete. All 11 tasks implemented. 36 tests passing. 96% coverage (threshold 80%). All 4 invariants verified. P0 features: phase indicator, timeline, DoD checklist, progress bar, task summary, auto-refresh. P1 features: transition history, task chart, dark mode. Proceeding to Ship.
Ship phase complete. README updated with full docs, .meta/ updated, all 36 tests passing, 96% coverage, app loads and serves correctly. Proceeding to Evaluate.
